facilities.title: Equestrian Center & Horseback Riding
facilities.description: Professional horseback riding facilities promoting physical coordination, confidence, and a unique connection with animals. Our equestrian program includes basic riding, stable management, and horse care education.

facilities.title: Sports Complex & Athletic Facilities
facilities.description: Comprehensive sports complex featuring basketball courts, tennis facilities, badminton halls, swimming pool, and dedicated athletic tracks. Professional coaching available for various sports disciplines.

facilities.title: Team Sports & Competitive Leagues
facilities.description: Organized competitive leagues in football, soccer, basketball, and volleyball. Emphasis on teamwork, sportsmanship, and physical fitness through structured training and inter-school competitions.

facilities.title: Individual Sports Excellence Program
facilities.description: Specialized training in tennis, badminton, swimming, and track & field athletics. Individual coaching to develop personal sports excellence alongside academic commitments.

facilities.title: Outdoor Adventure Activities
facilities.description: Comprehensive outdoor education program including hiking, environmental education, and group adventure activities that build resilience, leadership, and environmental awareness.
